title: Creating Folders
drDigitalIntro: You can make your own folders to organize your files however you like — a folder for taxes, one for photos, one for recipes. Making a folder and putting the right files inside keeps everything tidy and easy to find. Let's make one and move a file into it.

playgroundTask.goal: Make a folder and put a file inside it

steps.say: Folders keep your files organized. Click New Folder, type the name Taxes, and press Enter.
Now drag TaxReturn.pdf onto your new Taxes folder — or click the file once, then click the Taxes folder.

drDigitalSuccess: You created a Taxes folder and filed your tax return inside it. That's exactly how you keep a computer organized!
drDigitalHint: Click the glowing New Folder button first, type Taxes, press Enter. Then drag the tax file onto the Taxes folder.
